tool_args.label: M86 and M79 Select Bus Service - Manhattan Community Board 7 Presentation

payload.title: M86 and M79 Select Bus Service

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: M86 SBS operates with dedicated bus lanes, off-board fare collection, queue jump lanes, upgraded crosswalks, shelters, wayfinding signs, and bus arrival information
Analysis and design plan investigating similar treatments used for M86 SBS with goals to increase bus speeds and reliability, improve pedestrian and traffic safety, enhance customer experience
Requested M79 SBS
Crosstown corridor for M86 bus route
M79 bus corridor identified as potential candidate for SBS
Bus queue jump lanes on M86 SBS corridor
Lane realignments on M86 SBS corridor
Off-board fare payment on M86 SBS corridor
Shelters, wayfinding signs, bus arrival information on M86 SBS corridor
Upgraded crosswalks on M86 SBS corridor for pedestrian safety improvements
Finalize traffic analysis, develop street design and service plan, begin construction for off-board fare equipment for M79 SBS
Present draft plan to Community Boards, finalize street design and service plan for M79 SBS
Launch M79 Select Bus Service
